2604.00789.title: Valency Classification of Mapudungun Verbal Roots. Established by the language's own morphotactics
2604.00789.paper_summary: In the previous work, a lexical (re)categorisation -- or confirmation of the given category -- of roots identified as verbal was undertaken to determine their original category accurately. Building on this, the present paper offers an account of the valency classification of those Mapudungun roots confirmed to be verbal, using the language's own morphotactics; specifically, by examining the permissible and restricted combinations of various suffixes with roots or verbal stems in the Mapuche verb form. As with all work conducted thus far, the results presented here aim to improve the morphological analyser (Dungupeyum) with all verified findings incorporated into the system. From a theoretical perspective, we also hope to contribute to the recognition and understanding of issues related to the valency of Mapuche verb forms.
2604.00789.paper_summary_zh: 在之前的研究中，對被識別為動詞的詞根進行了詞彙（重新）分類或確認，以準確確定其原始類別。基於此，本文提供了對那些已確認為動詞的Mapudungun詞根的價值分類，使用該語言自身的形態學規則；具體來說，通過檢查各種後綴與詞根或動詞詞幹在Mapuche動詞形式中的允許和限制組合。與迄今為止進行的所有工作一樣，此處呈現的結果旨在改善形態分析器（Dungupeyum），將所有經過驗證的發現納入系統。從理論的角度來看，我們也希望能夠對Mapuche動詞形式的價值相關問題的認識和理解做出貢獻。
2604.00789.author: Andrés Chandía et.al.
